items.name_en: Tan elephant print with gold buckle
items.name_cn:
Tan elephant print with gold buckle
niki_28cm is simply too cool, the bag shape is beautiful with no flaws, soft and delicate sheepskin creates a retro yet stylish look. Handheld or crossbody is very doable, full of presence, suitable for both men and women. Fashion meets functionality, comfortable and stylish to wear.
Extra-large capacity perfectly arranged for daily commute and travel👌
Style No.:633158
Size:28×20.5×8.5cm

items.name_en: Tan Grainy Leather with Gold Buckle · 22cm
items.name_cn:
Tan Grainy Leather with Gold Buckle · 22cm
The most elegant accordion bag series sac de jour, a timeless classic. Exquisite grainy cowhide with a rich luster, very luxurious! The strap is adjustable, choose the length you prefer! The logo is very small, perfectly embodying the understated luxury style~
Model: 717440
Size: 22x18x10.5cm

items.name_en: Tan Grainy Leather with Gold Buckle · 26cm
items.name_cn:
Tan Grainy Leather with Gold Buckle · 26cm
The most elegant accordion bag series sac de jour, a timeless classic. Exquisite grainy cowhide with clear texture and a rich luster, very luxurious! Comes with a middle divider inside the 26cm size, can be removed to use as a clutch. The strap is adjustable, choose the length you prefer! The logo is very small, perfectly embodying the understated luxury style~
Model: 421863/477477
Size: 26x20.5x12.5cm
(Comes with a middle divider inside the 26cm size)

items.name_en: Tan·
items.name_cn:
Tan·
LE 37 Bucket Bag Small_
Super cute bucket bag with handle_New style, made of Italian calfskin. The bag has a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured but not too sharp. It features metal studs at the bottom and a classic metal logo insert buckle. The overall look gives a unique blend of classic elegance and modern chic!
Size: 17×20×13cm
Model: 749036

items.name_en: The 23A31 tote bag is back, stylish and versatile, and especially practical. It can be worn on the shoulder and has a handle for carrying. It has an elegant, exquisite, retro feel that is durable and grand; it's hard not to love.

items.name_en: The Bow Clasp (Butterfly Knot) has become a Bottega Veneta bestseller with its unique elegance. This new leather & canvas version is perfectly tailored for spring and summer. The natural laziness of the linen fabric, paired with chestnut leather, exudes a vintage vibe. A refreshing change from the all-leather version, it has a unique charm.

The Bow Clasp (Butterfly Knot) has become a Bottega Veneta bestseller with its unique elegance. This new leather & canvas version is perfectly tailored for spring and summer. Style: 743572
Size: 32.5*24*12cm
